caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green tunic with red and black decorative embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. In the sequence of images, she is gesturing with her hands as she speaks, moving her right hand upward and then slightly outward. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her tunic. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, there is a small circular logo with the text "NPTEL" written in white uppercase letters beside it. The camera remains in a steady medium shot, focusing on the woman from the chest up, with very little change in the overall composition as she continues her delivery.
